title: Tidal Towns
description: Several pieces of driftwood have been gathered to form a village that floats on the waves.
body:
[![discord-plural](https://joshie.app/files/discord_join.svg)](https://discord.gg/HUMbRQhxdR)         [![paypal-plural](https://joshie.app/files/payppal_me.svg)](https://paypal.me/joshieman)         [![youtube-plural](https://joshie.app/files/youtube_banner.svg)](https://www.youtube.com/@joshieman)
![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Tidal_Towns/BH_Tidal_Towns_description.webp) These crafty villagers have embarked on a new voyage: sailing the seas. You can now find ocean villages throughout the seas. They have maps, farms, houses, and even a blacksmith on these Tidal Towns. Generates in the vanilla `deep_ocean`. [![Host with BisectHosting with 25% OFF using code JOSHIE](https://joshie.app/files/tidal_towns_affiliate_banner.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/joshie?r=mr_tidal_towns) ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Tidal_Towns/BH_Tidal_Towns_screenshots.webp)
![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Tidal_Towns/BH_Tidal_Towns_faq.webp) **How do I find one?** - Explore the ocean or use the command `/locate structure joshie:ocean_village`. **Where do I find one?** - Generates in the vanilla `deep_ocean`. **Can I use this on my server?** - The structure uses vanilla blocks, so server owners can install the datapack and vanilla clients will be able to join fine. **Can I use this in my modpack/video/world/server?** - You are more than welcome to use Tidal Towns in any of these contexts. [![Use code JOSHIE for 25% off at BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Tidal_Towns/BH_Tidal_Towns_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/joshie?r=mr_tidal_towns)
